name: Gesztenye Kremleves (Cream of Chestnut Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chestnuts, shell them, and puree them.
2. Brown the chopped vegetables with the meat in butter over low heat for 10 minutes.
3. Add 5 cups water, salt, pepper and cook the soup over low heat until vegetables and meat are done.
4. Mix the pureed chestnuts into the cooked soup and boil for another 5 minutes.
5. Mix heavy cream with egg yolks, whip into the soup. Adjust seasoning, serve.
